title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at BigBasket Logistics - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at BigBasket Logistics - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with BigBasket Logistics! We are hiring a Distribution Manager for our Bhopal team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About BigBasket Logistics:
BigBasket Logistics is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BigBasket Logistics!
